name: FIRST NORTHERN COMMUNITY BANCORP
business: First Northern Community Bancorp is a bank holding company that provides community banking services to individual and corporate customers in California counties including Solano, Yolo, Placer, Sacramento, and portions of El Dorado. Through its subsidiary First Northern Bank of Dixon, it offers deposit products, commercial and consumer loans, and real estate loans. It also provides alternative investment products and other financial services through third parties.

exposures.sentence: Threats to the banking sector and our business due to cybersecurity issues and attacks and regulatory expectations related to cybersecurity
